title: EMPLOYMENT SERVICES - 211info
text: OREGON ROHINGYA MYANMAR MUSLIM SOCIETY EMPLOYMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers employment and career services including job placement assistance, resume building, interview preparation, and career counseling. Also provides support in navigating the local job market, offering guidance on workers rights and workplace culture. 2410 SE 121st Avenue Suite #208 Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Must meet one of the following: -Immigrants, refugees, and asylum seekers -Low-income individuals and families residing in Oregon -Individuals with limited English proficiency -Families experiencing hardship, displacement, or housing instability -Youth, adults, and elders across all ages -BIPOC (Black, Indigenous, Persons of Color) -Rohingya and Myanmar Community Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 489-5179 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 489-5179 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or appointment, visit website, or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Burmese, Rohingya, Bangali, Karen, Kachin, Zomi, Chin, Hakka Chin, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: Business Development * Agricultural Issues Career Counseling Job Finding Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - AGRICULTURAL AND FARMING SUPPORT LEGAL SERVICES - LEGAL SERVICE SUPPORT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CULTURAL ADJUSTMENT SUPPORT SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAM SUPPORT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON ROHINGYA MYANMAR MUSLIM SOCIETY
